title: QueryBuilder
description: QueryBuilder: A QueryBuilder constructs the OpenStreetMap query from a set of regions to search within and elements to search for.

QueryString.description: The OpenStreetMap Overpass API query statement in Overpass QL format.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
